title: Vegan Korean-Style Stir-Fry
description: A spicy and savory vegan stir-fry featuring crispy Korean-style vegetables, carrots, and a variety of seasonings.
instructions: Heat sesame oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add ginger and garlic and stir-fry for 1 minute.
Add the carrots and Korean-style vegetables and stir-fry for 3-4 minutes, or until tender.
In a small bowl, whisk together rice vinegar, gochujang, and soy sauce.
Pour the sauce over the vegetables and stir-fry for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Garnish with chopped green onions and serve immediately.
